Ansible.Description: Automates baseline security configurations across multiple systems.

Activities.Description: Baseline hardening establishes a secure configuration baseline for systems and infrastructure components, ensuring adherence to organizational security standards and reducing vulnerabilities. Tools like Ansible, Puppet, and Chef enforce baseline configurations within CI/CD pipelines.

Baseline hardening establishes a secure configuration baseline for systems and infrastructure components, ensuring adherence to organizational security standards and reducing vulnerabilities. Tools like Ansible, Puppet, and Chef enforce baseline configurations within CI/CD pipelines.

Restricting virtualized resources reduces the attack surface by ensuring that only authorized and necessary virtual environments are deployed. Tools like Terraform and Ansible enforce policies for managing virtual environments within CI/CD pipelines.

Activities.Activity: Test the Definition of Virtualized Environments
Activities.Description: Validating virtualized environment configurations ensures adherence to security and performance standards. Tools like Terraform, Ansible, and Packer automate the testing and validation process within CI/CD pipelines.

Infrastructure as Code (IaC) uses machine-readable configuration files to manage and provision computing infrastructure. This ensures consistency, repeatability, and version control, enhancing security and efficiency. Tools like Terraform, Ansible, and Pulumi support IaC implementations.

Measuring and optimizing patch deployment time ensures that security patches are applied promptly, minimizing vulnerability exposure. Tools like Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD, and Ansible automate patch deployment tracking and optimization in CI/CD pipelines.

Testing virtualized environments ensures that virtual machines and containers are securely configured and compliant with security standards. Tools like Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform automate the validation of virtualized environments within CI/CD pipelines.

Applying comprehensive security measures, including secure configurations, removal of unnecessary services, and robust access controls, to harden environments against vulnerabilities. Tools like Ansible, Puppet, and Chef automate the hardening process in CI/CD workflows.

Maintaining an inventory of production components ensures comprehensive tracking and management of all software and hardware elements in the production environment. This enhances visibility, facilitates efficient maintenance, and supports compliance and auditing processes. Tools like Ansible, Puppet, and Terraform, integrated into CI/CD pipelines, automate inventory updates.

JaCoCo.Description: Java code coverage library to analyze test coverage.

Activities.Description: Coverage analysis in dynamic testing measures how much of an application's code is exercised during tests. It identifies untested parts of the codebase, ensuring comprehensive testing and minimizing undiscovered vulnerabilities. Tools like JaCoCo, Istanbul, Coverage.py, and Codecov assist in measuring and visualizing code coverage.

Activities.Description: Tracking coverage and control metrics ensures the effectiveness of security controls and identifies areas for improvement. Combining performance and security metrics with testing provides a comprehensive evaluation of application behavior and security posture. Tools like Grafana, Prometheus, and Splunk enable visualization and analysis of integrated metrics and test results.

Identifying and deactivating unused metrics reduces resource consumption and focuses monitoring on critical metrics. Tools like Prometheus, Grafana, and Datadog can automate this process within DevSecOps pipelines.

Organizing related metrics into groups enhances clarity and efficiency during monitoring and analysis. Tools like Grafana, Prometheus, and Datadog automate grouping and visualization of metrics in CI/CD pipelines.

Generating response statistics involves collecting and analyzing metrics related to security incident responses, such as Mean Time to Resolution (MTTR). This helps evaluate the effectiveness of incident management processes. Tools like Prometheus and Grafana automate data collection and visualization for informed decision-making.

Docker.Description: Platform for containerized application development and deployment.

Activities.Activity: Applications Are Running in Virtualized Environments
Activities.Description: Deploying applications in virtualized environments enhances scalability, flexibility, and security. Tools like Docker, Kubernetes, and VMware vSphere enable efficient resource utilization and application isolation.

Immutable infrastructure ensures components are never modified after deployment; any updates result in redeployment. This approach reduces the attack surface and ensures consistency. Tools like Terraform, Kubernetes, and Docker automate immutable infrastructure deployment within CI/CD pipelines.

Adopting a microservice architecture structures applications as collections of loosely coupled, independently deployable services. This approach enhances scalability, flexibility, and resilience while introducing new security considerations. Tools like Kubernetes, Docker, and Istio automate the deployment and management of microservices in CI/CD pipelines.

Testing virtualized environments ensures that virtual machines and containers are securely configured and compliant with security standards. Tools like Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform automate the validation of virtualized environments within CI/CD pipelines.

SonarQube.Description: Analyzes code for vulnerabilities and integrates with CI/CD pipelines.

Activities.Activity: Integration of Vulnerability Issues into the Development Process
Activities.Description: Embedding vulnerability tracking and remediation into the development process ensures that security issues are addressed early in the SDLC. Tools like SonarQube, GitLab CI/CD, and Snyk automate the identification and resolution of vulnerabilities within CI/CD workflows.

Managing false positives involves identifying and dismissing incorrect vulnerability alerts, reducing noise and focusing on genuine security issues. Tools like SonarQube, GitLab SAST, and ESLint automate the suppression of false positives in CI/CD pipelines.

Identifying and removing unused or redundant code improves maintainability, reduces vulnerabilities, and optimizes performance. Tools like SonarQube, ESLint, and PMD support automated dead code detection and elimination in CI/CD workflows.

Removing duplicate code segments enhances maintainability, reduces vulnerabilities, and improves code quality. Tools like SonarQube, PMD, and CodeClimate automate detection and elimination of duplicate code within CI/CD workflows.

Security code reviews systematically identify and remediate vulnerabilities in source code, ensuring adherence to security best practices. Tools like SonarQube, GitHub CodeQL, and GitLab SAST automate code reviews within CI/CD pipelines.

Application Hardening Level 1 implements basic security measures like input validation, error handling, and secure coding practices to protect applications. Tools like ESLint, SonarQube, and OWASP ZAP automate these measures in CI/CD pipelines.

Partial implementation of Application Hardening Level 1 focuses on some security measures, like input validation and error handling, but lacks comprehensive coverage. Tools like ESLint and SonarQube assist in enforcing these partial measures.

Comprehensive implementation of advanced security measures, including security integration throughout the development lifecycle and continuous monitoring. Tools like OWASP ZAP, Fortify, Snyk, and SonarQube automate these practices within CI/CD pipelines.
Ensures secure handling of data based on its context to prevent injection attacks. Tools like ESLint and SonarQube enforce encoding standards in CI/CD pipelines.

Advanced visualization of defects enables teams to monitor software quality and security comprehensively by creating interactive dashboards. These dashboards display defect metrics, trends, and patterns, offering actionable insights for proactive improvement. Tools like SonarQube, Jira, and Grafana streamline data aggregation and visualization within CI/CD pipelines.

Artifactory.Description: Manages artifact repositories and enforces version pinning.

Activities.Description: Pinning artifacts locks dependencies and libraries to specific, approved versions, ensuring that only secure and tested versions are used during the build and deployment processes. Tools like Dependabot and Renovate automate this process in CI/CD pipelines.

CycloneDX.Description: Creates SBOMs for application security and supply chain analysis.

Activities.Description: Generating a Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) documents all components, dependencies, and versions used in the application. This inventory aids in identifying vulnerabilities and maintaining compliance. Tools like CycloneDX, SPDX, and Syft automate SBOM creation within CI/CD pipelines.

SPDX.Description: Provides a standard for communicating SBOM information.

Activities.Description: Generating a Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) documents all components, dependencies, and versions used in the application. This inventory aids in identifying vulnerabilities and maintaining compliance. Tools like CycloneDX, SPDX, and Syft automate SBOM creation within CI/CD pipelines.

Syft.Description: Generates SBOMs for container images and file systems.

Activities.Description: Generating a Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) documents all components, dependencies, and versions used in the application. This inventory aids in identifying vulnerabilities and maintaining compliance. Tools like CycloneDX, SPDX, and Syft automate SBOM creation within CI/CD pipelines.

Anchore.Description: Performs deep container inspection and generates SBOMs.

Activities.Description: Generating a Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) documents all components, dependencies, and versions used in the application. This inventory aids in identifying vulnerabilities and maintaining compliance. Tools like CycloneDX, SPDX, and Syft automate SBOM creation within CI/CD pipelines.

Maintaining an up-to-date inventory of production artifacts, such as container images, ensures rapid identification and mitigation of vulnerabilities. This documentation can be gathered manually or automated to track where affected artifacts are deployed, improving response times to high-severity vulnerabilities.

Black Duck.Description: Manages open-source risks by identifying and mitigating security vulnerabilities and license issues.

Activities.Activity: Evaluation of the Trust of Used Components
Activities.Description: Evaluating the trustworthiness of components ensures that dependencies and system artifacts are secure and reliable. Tools like Black Duck, Snyk, and Sonatype Nexus Lifecycle automate this evaluation and enforce policies for trusted artifacts within CI/CD pipelines.

Sonatype Nexus Lifecycle.Description: Provides governance and policy enforcement for managing open-source components.

Activities.Activity: Evaluation of the Trust of Used Components
Activities.Description: Evaluating the trustworthiness of components ensures that dependencies and system artifacts are secure and reliable. Tools like Black Duck, Snyk, and Sonatype Nexus Lifecycle automate this evaluation and enforce policies for trusted artifacts within CI/CD pipelines.

ThreatModeler.Description: Automates threat modeling and integrates with development workflows to identify risks.

Activities.Description: Advanced threat modeling identifies security risks by analyzing user stories and creating security-focused data flow diagrams. This process proactively mitigates business and technical risks, enhancing application security.

OWASP Threat Dragon.Description: An open-source tool for collaborative creation and analysis of threat models.

Activities.Description: Advanced threat modeling identifies security risks by analyzing user stories and creating security-focused data flow diagrams. This process proactively mitigates business and technical risks, enhancing application security.

Activities.Activity: Conduction of Simple Threat Modeling on Business Level
Activities.Description: Simple threat modeling identifies security risks related to business functionalities during the product backlog creation, enabling early mitigation of risks.

Pylint.Description: Static code analyzer for Python to enforce coding standards and detect issues.

Activities.Activity: Local Development Linting & Style Checks Performed
Activities.Description: Static code analysis tools integrated into IDEs ensure adherence to coding standards and secure practices. This reduces vulnerabilities and improves maintainability by identifying issues early in the development process.

Rubocop.Description: Static code analyzer and formatter for Ruby, enforcing the Ruby style guide.

Activities.Activity: Local Development Linting & Style Checks Performed
Activities.Description: Static code analysis tools integrated into IDEs ensure adherence to coding standards and secure practices. This reduces vulnerabilities and improves maintainability by identifying issues early in the development process.

StyleCop.Description: Analyzes C# code to enforce consistency and quality.

Activities.Activity: Local Development Linting & Style Checks Performed
Activities.Description: Static code analysis tools integrated into IDEs ensure adherence to coding standards and secure practices. This reduces vulnerabilities and improves maintainability by identifying issues early in the development process.

Checkstyle.Description: Helps developers write Java code adhering to coding standards.

Activities.Activity: Local Development Linting & Style Checks Performed
Activities.Description: Static code analysis tools integrated into IDEs ensure adherence to coding standards and secure practices. This reduces vulnerabilities and improves maintainability by identifying issues early in the development process.

SonarLint.Description: IDE extension providing real-time feedback on code quality and security.

Activities.Activity: Local Development Linting & Style Checks Performed
Activities.Description: Static code analysis tools integrated into IDEs ensure adherence to coding standards and secure practices. This reduces vulnerabilities and improves maintainability by identifying issues early in the development process.

ModSecurity.Description: Open-source WAF providing baseline protection rules.

Activities.Description: Setting up a basic Web Application Firewall (WAF) configuration provides essential protection against common threats. Tools like AWS WAF, Cloudflare WAF, and ModSecurity automate baseline WAF rule deployments.

AWS Elastic Beanstalk.Description: Simplifies deployment and scaling of web applications across environments.

Activities.Description: Blue/Green Deployment reduces deployment risk by running two identical environments (Blue and Green) and switching between them during deployments. Tools like Kubernetes, AWS Elastic Beanstalk, and Spinnaker automate routing and switching processes for seamless deployments.

Spinnaker.Description: Facilitates multi-cloud continuous delivery with Blue/Green deployment capabilities.

Activities.Description: Blue/Green Deployment reduces deployment risk by running two identical environments (Blue and Green) and switching between them during deployments. Tools like Kubernetes, AWS Elastic Beanstalk, and Spinnaker automate routing and switching processes for seamless deployments.

Azure Site Recovery.Description: Ensures business continuity by keeping workloads running during outages.

Activities.Activity: Definition of Simple BCDR Practices for Critical Components
Activities.Description: Simple Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery (BCDR) practices ensure application and system availability during emergencies. These practices outline recovery point objectives (RPOs), recovery time objectives (RTOs), SLAs, and failover strategies.

Veeam Backup & Replication.Description: Provides backup and recovery solutions to ensure data availability.

Activities.Activity: Definition of Simple BCDR Practices for Critical Components
Activities.Description: Simple Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery (BCDR) practices ensure application and system availability during emergencies. These practices outline recovery point objectives (RPOs), recovery time objectives (RTOs), SLAs, and failover strategies.

Disaster Recovery Plan Templates.Description: Templates for documenting effective BCDR strategies and procedures.

Activities.Activity: Definition of Simple BCDR Practices for Critical Components
Activities.Description: Simple Business Continuity and Disaster Recovery (BCDR) practices ensure application and system availability during emergencies. These practices outline recovery point objectives (RPOs), recovery time objectives (RTOs), SLAs, and failover strategies.

Root Cause Analysis Tools.Description: Helps in identifying the underlying causes of incidents.

Activities.Description: 'Lessons learned' sessions analyze security incidents to identify root causes and define preventive measures, fostering continuous improvement and enhanced incident response.

LaunchDarkly.Description: Manages feature releases using feature flags for precise control.

Activities.Description: Feature toggles enable or disable features dynamically without requiring code changes or redeployments. Using static feature toggles, independent of environment variables, mitigates the risk of inadvertently enabling insecure features in production. Tools like LaunchDarkly, Unleash, and FeatureToggle automate the management and deployment of feature flags within CI/CD pipelines.

Unleash.Description: Open-source feature toggle system for managing feature releases.

Activities.Description: Feature toggles enable or disable features dynamically without requiring code changes or redeployments. Using static feature toggles, independent of environment variables, mitigates the risk of inadvertently enabling insecure features in production. Tools like LaunchDarkly, Unleash, and FeatureToggle automate the management and deployment of feature flags within CI/CD pipelines.

FeatureToggle.Description: Manages feature flags to control feature visibility within applications.

Activities.Description: Feature toggles enable or disable features dynamically without requiring code changes or redeployments. Using static feature toggles, independent of environment variables, mitigates the risk of inadvertently enabling insecure features in production. Tools like LaunchDarkly, Unleash, and FeatureToggle automate the management and deployment of feature flags within CI/CD pipelines.

JMeter.Description: Open-source tool for load testing and performance measurement.

Activities.Description: Load tests simulate high-traffic scenarios to evaluate application and infrastructure performance under stress. Tools like JMeter, Locust, and Gatling automate load testing within CI/CD pipelines.

Locust.Description: Python-based tool for scalable load testing.

Activities.Description: Load tests simulate high-traffic scenarios to evaluate application and infrastructure performance under stress. Tools like JMeter, Locust, and Gatling automate load testing within CI/CD pipelines.

Gatling.Description: High-performance load testing tool using Scala.

Activities.Description: Load tests simulate high-traffic scenarios to evaluate application and infrastructure performance under stress. Tools like JMeter, Locust, and Gatling automate load testing within CI/CD pipelines.

Nmap.Description: Scans networks for exposed services and vulnerabilities.

Activities.Description: Testing for exposed services identifies externally accessible endpoints to ensure they are secure. Tools like Nmap, Shodan, and OpenVAS automate this process in CI/CD pipelines to minimize attack surfaces.

Shodan.Description: Searches for internet-connected devices to identify exposed services.

Activities.Description: Testing for exposed services identifies externally accessible endpoints to ensure they are secure. Tools like Nmap, Shodan, and OpenVAS automate this process in CI/CD pipelines to minimize attack surfaces.

AWS Trusted Advisor.Description: Optimizes AWS resources by identifying unused components.

Activities.Description: Identifying and removing unused infrastructure components reduces security risks and optimizes resource usage. Tools like AWS Trusted Advisor, Azure Resource Manager, and Google Cloud Resource Manager automate these checks in CI/CD pipelines.

Google Cloud Resource Manager.Description: Manages and optimizes Google Cloud resources, identifying unused components.

Activities.Description: Identifying and removing unused infrastructure components reduces security risks and optimizes resource usage. Tools like AWS Trusted Advisor, Azure Resource Manager, and Google Cloud Resource Manager automate these checks in CI/CD pipelines.

OSSEC.Description: An open-source host-based intrusion detection system that monitors system changes and detects unauthorized installations or configurations, compatible with CI/CD workflows.

Activities.Description: Testing for unauthorized installations ensures that no unapproved software or applications are deployed within the infrastructure. This reduces risks associated with malicious or unverified software compromising system security. Tools such as Tripwire, OSSEC, and Sysdig can be integrated into DevSecOps pipelines to automate the detection, alerting, and prevention of unauthorized installations.

Sysdig.Description: A runtime security tool providing monitoring and detection of unauthorized installations and activities within containerized environments, integrated into CI/CD pipelines.

Activities.Description: Testing for unauthorized installations ensures that no unapproved software or applications are deployed within the infrastructure. This reduces risks associated with malicious or unverified software compromising system security. Tools such as Tripwire, OSSEC, and Sysdig can be integrated into DevSecOps pipelines to automate the detection, alerting, and prevention of unauthorized installations.

ServiceNow.Description: A comprehensive IT service management platform that supports the automation and tracking of service and asset decommissioning processes.

Activities.Description: Establishing a clear decommissioning process ensures that unused applications are systematically removed from the 'Inventory of Production Components' and, where applicable, the 'Inventory of Production Artifacts.' This reduces risks associated with vulnerabilities in obsolete applications, minimizing their exploitation by attackers.

CMDB (e.g., BMC Helix, Device42).Description: Configuration Management Database tools that facilitate inventory management and ensure streamlined decommissioning processes.

Activities.Description: Establishing a clear decommissioning process ensures that unused applications are systematically removed from the 'Inventory of Production Components' and, where applicable, the 'Inventory of Production Artifacts.' This reduces risks associated with vulnerabilities in obsolete applications, minimizing their exploitation by attackers.

Clair.Description: A vulnerability analysis tool for container images that helps organizations manage production artifacts with static vulnerability scans.

Activities.Description: Maintaining an up-to-date inventory of production artifacts, such as container images, ensures rapid identification and mitigation of vulnerabilities. This documentation can be gathered manually or automated to track where affected artifacts are deployed, improving response times to high-severity vulnerabilities.

AWS Artifact.Description: A service for accessing AWS compliance reports and managing production artifacts in cloud environments.

Activities.Description: Maintaining an up-to-date inventory of production artifacts, such as container images, ensures rapid identification and mitigation of vulnerabilities. This documentation can be gathered manually or automated to track where affected artifacts are deployed, improving response times to high-severity vulnerabilities.
